advertisements.description: Vera-Reynolds Insurance Co, announces the interesting fact that Fort Worth and Tarrant County now have 4,658 licensed automobiles and you, Mr. Owner, are taking a risk every time you leave your garage. Do you know that you can enjoy an evening's ride without the thought of the expense of an accident to yourself, to your car or the other fellow's car, when you are insured by our company at our lower rates. We will be pleased to quote you these new automobile rates How in effect at our agency. VERA-REYNOLDS INSURANCE CO. 404-405-406 Reynolds Bldg. Lamar 1037.
